name: Diced Gazpacho Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the husks from the tomatillos and rinse them.
2. Dice the red onion to yield approximately 1/2 cup.
3. Seed the cucumber and cut into 1/2-inch dice to yield about 1 cup.
4. Seed the red bell pepper and cut into 1/2-inch squares to yield approximately 1 1/2 cups.
5. Peel the avocado and cut into 1/2-inch dice.
6. Coarsely slice 2 of the tomatillos and combine with salt, oregano, parsley, and black pepper in a food processor; chop finely.
7. Add olive oil and blend until smooth.
8. Cut the remaining tomatillos into 1/4-inch dice.
9. Combine diced tomatillos, onion, cucumber, and red bell pepper in a serving dish.
10. Toss with dressing.
11. Add avocado and toss gently.
12. Cover and chill for about an hour before serving to 4 people.
